so an awakener made from a dead person's silver core can be considered ressurected, yes

I understand awakeners, but the keeper I'm really confused, I know that our keeper seems to have an exceptional talent when it comes to linking (I remember in the story it stated that linkers usually could only link one awakener at a time, ours has linked with atleast 5 at once I think), but the keeper has also done several superhuman feats in the story, and during the prologue we seem to write/engrave our name on a grave stone, the keeper also mentions or implies that he was there for his own funeral as part of the silver key passing ceremony or something, so I'm hella confused as to what the keeper really is
do we have any summaries of some of the MTL'd deepdives? it's paaaiiiinful to read MTL for me (but i suck it up if i really like the character)
secondly, how spoilery is mouchette's story? I just started chapter 3 in arc 2, but it says that it's recommended i finish chapter 4

the engraving part is fully ceremonial. its to symbolize that investigators are aware that they're very likely going to die on the job, and if they do, no one might remember them to make a grave for them (because dissolution)
personally id say as long as you've completed arc1 its safe enough to read
arc2 ch2 and ch4  the critical cutoff points for arc2 stories but mouchettes isnt much (you miss a tiny bit of context from Celestial Aria)
